versions.version_description: This version of Little Jeannie is best played with barre chords but open chords sound good too. No capo is required.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Can You Feel The Love Tonight

recommended.version_description: Corrected vocal melody and percussion hits that had been distorted in transfer.

content:
Little Jeannie - Elton John.
#33 in UK and #3 in USA in 1980.

[Intro]
[ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] 
[ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh, little Jeannie, you got so much love, [/tab]

little Jeannie.
[tab]        [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
And you take it where it strikes and give [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
it to the likes of me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh, little Jeannie, she got so much love, [/tab]

little Jeannie.
[tab]      [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
So, I see you when I can, you make me all a [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
man can be.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]
And I want you to be my acrobat, I want you to [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
be my lover.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, there were others who would treat you cruel..[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
and oh, Jeannie, you were always someone's fool.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]
Little Jeannie, you got so much time, little Jeannie.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Ab[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Though you've grown beyond your years, you still retain [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
the fears of youth.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh, little Jeannie, you got so much time, little Jeannie.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
But you're burning it up so fast, searching for some [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
lasting truth.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]
And I want you to be my acrobat, I want you to [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
be my lover.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, there were others who would treat you cruel..[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Cm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
and oh, Jeannie, I will always be your fool.[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch] 
[ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]
And I want you to be my acrobat, I want you to [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
be my lover.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, there were others and I've known quite a few..[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
but oh, Jeannie.....I'm still in love with..[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
You stepped into my life from a bad dream..[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]
making the life that I had seem suddenly shiny [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
and new.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, Jeannie..(oh, Jeannie)..I'm so in love with..[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
You stepped into my life from a bad dream..[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]
making the life that I had seem suddenly shiny [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
and new.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, Jeannie..(oh, Jeannie)..I'm so in love with you..[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]
making the life that I had seem suddenly shiny [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
and new.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, Jeannie..(oh, Jeannie)..I'm so in love with you..[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
You stepped into my life from a bad dream..[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]
making the life that I had seem suddenly shiny [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
and new.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, Jeannie..(oh, Jeannie)..I'm so in love with you..[/tab]
(Fade.)
